description: Search for or read a FHIR Appointment resource for scheduled healthcare events. For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, provide patient, identifier, actor, practitioner, location, slot, or based-on. Use date for time filtering and status to find booked, arrived, or cancelled appointments.

searchParams._id: Appointment resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.actor: Any individual participating (patient, practitioner, device, location)
searchParams.based-on: Service request (order) that led to this appointment
searchParams.part-status: Participation status of a participant (accepted, declined, tentative, needs-action)
searchParams.reason-code: Coded reason the appointment is scheduled
searchParams.reason-reference: Condition, Procedure, Observation, or ImmunizationRecommendation reason
searchParams.slot: Slot that this appointment is filling
searchParams.status: Status: proposed, pending, booked, arrived, fulfilled, cancelled, noshow, entered-in-error, checked-in, waitlist
searchParams.supporting-info: Additional information to support the appointment
